kirundi.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Ihindura icinjira. Yubatswe kuva PMOS 1 + NMOS 1 (CMOS inverter).
kirundi.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Igisohoka kiri hejuru gusa iyo ivyinjira vyombi biri hejuru. NAND + NOT (transisitori 6).
kirundi.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Igisohoka kiri hejuru iyo icinjira ico ari co cose kiri hejuru. NOR + NOT (transisitori 6).
kirundi.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Igisohoka kiri hejuru iyo ivyinjira bitandukanye. Ingenzi ku bavyongera. Bikoresha transisitori ~8.
kirundi.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Igisohoka kiri hejuru iyo ivyinjira bihura. Bikoreshwa mu bigereranya.
kirundi.click_components_above_to_add_them: Fyonda ku bice biri hejuru kugira ngo uvyongereho
kirundi.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: Igiti ca silikoni gikururwa kuva muri silikoni yashongeshejwe hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa Czochralski kuri ~1414 °C.
kirundi.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: Urumuri rwa UV rwohereza imiterere ya sirkwi kuva ku mask ija kuri wafer zisize fotoresist.
kirundi.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: Ibikoresho bitifuzwa bikurwaho hakoreshejwe gushushanya kwa shimi (gitobetse) canke plasma (kumye).
kirundi.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: Atomu za dopant zirasirwa muri silikoni ku mbaraga nyinshi kugira ngo zihindure ibiranga vyazo vy'amashanyarazi.
kirundi.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: Inzego z'icuma na insulator bishirwaho hakoreshejwe tekiniki za CVD, PVD canke ALD.
kirundi.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: Amahuriro y'icuma ashushanywa kandi akozwe akaba ahwanye. Inzego nyinshi zubaka insinga za sirkwi.
kirundi.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Igishushanyo c'Itegeko rya Moore kigaragaza umubare wa transisitori kuva 1965 kugeza 2030
kirundi.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Amarembo yareremba ahujwe mu rukurikirane. Kwinjira mu rukurikirane ariko vyuzuye cane. SSD, drive za USB, amakarita ya SD.
kirundi.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: Kapasitori ferroelectric ibika charge hamwe na polarization isigaye. Ntibapfa + kwandika vyihuse. Bikoreshwa mu makarita y'ubwenge, imodoka.
kirundi.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Umwongereza w'amashanyarazi. Impedance yo kwinjira iri hejuru (∞ ku vyiza). Inyungu = -gₘRₓ. Ihindura ikimenyetso. Umwongereza wa MOSFET usanzwe cane.
kirundi.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Yongera itandukaniro ry'ivyinjira bibiri. Yanga urusaku rwa common-mode. Ishingiro rya op-amp. CMRR akenshi >60dB.
kirundi.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Icuho ca band hagati ya 0.5 na 3.5 eV ni semiconductor.
kirundi.forward_pushing_carriers_toward_the_ju: Imbere = gusunika abatwara BAJA ku ihuriro.
kirundi.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: Ingufu z'ubushuhe nyinshi = amakoro ya electron-icobo menshi.
kirundi.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND ishobora gushira mu bikorwa NOT, AND, OR — vyose!
kirundi.v_kt_q_ln_n_n_n_for_typical_doping_lev: Vₑᵢ = (kT/q)ln(NₐNₓ/nᵢ²) ku nzego zisanzwe zo gushiramwo.
kirundi.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: Cache ya L1 ikeneye igihe co kwinjira cihuta bishoboka.
kirundi.temperature_rising_in_a_semiconductor_: Ubushuhe burazamuka! Muri semiconductor, kuzamuka kw'ubushuhe bikora iki ku bushobozi bwo gutwara?
kirundi.signal_to_noise_ratio_dropping_what_do: Igipimo c'ikimenyetso ku rusaku kiragabanuka! Ni iki umwongereza utandukanye wanga?
kirundi.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Gushira silikoni fosifore (ubwoko-n) canke borone (ubwoko-p) ni ishingiro rya buri chip yigeze gukorwa. Ihuriro PN ni igice c'ubwubatsi ca buri diyodi + LED + selire y'izuba + transisitori.
kirundi.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Shira bias kuri transisitori, bara ingufu z'icuho ca band, hanura umuyoboro ku mashanyarazi. Ibibazo vya AP Physics 2 + intanguriro ya EE hamwe n'ibisubizo intambwe ku yindi.
kirundi.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Ibihe vy'igitutu c'igihe: wubaka sirkwi vuba kuruta saa. Bipima nimba kwiyumvira kwa semiconductor ari ukwikora, atari gusa kumenyekana.
kirundi.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley bahimvye transisitori muri Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Itegeko rya Moore: umubare wa transisitori wikuba kabiri buri ~myaka 2; wamaze imyaka 50+ mbere yo kugabanuka.
kirundi.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Vyegera imyitwarire y'icuma. Bikoreshwa ku mahuriro.
kirundi.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Hindura ubwinshi bwa dopant, ubushuhe, ibikoresho. Uburyo bwa band 4 butandukanye. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.hypothesis_how_does_temperature_affect: Iciyumviro: Ni gute ubushuhe bugira ingaruka ku bwinshi bw'abatwara?
kirundi.explain_how_concentration_temperature_: Sigura uko ubwinshi, ubushuhe, n'ibikoresho hamwe bigena uburyo.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_marker_no: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso ca leta 4 gitandukanye; nta manota y'ubwinshi bw'abatwara; nta guhishura — nk'uko vyateguwe.
